mapper.sql: id, parent_session_id, parent_coding_task_id, role, title, goal, constraints, context_files::text AS context_files, depends_on::text AS depends_on, status, depth, spawned_from_task_id, worker_agent_id, result_summary, error_message, metadata::text AS metadata, created_at, started_at, finished_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_orchestration_task (parent_session_id, parent_coding_task_id, role, title, goal, constraints, context_files, depends_on, status, depth, spawned_from_task_id, worker_agent_id, result_summary, error_message, metadata, started_at, finished_at) VALUES (CAST(#{parentSessionId} AS uuid), CAST(#{parentCodingTaskId} AS uuid), #{role}, #{title}, #{goal}, #{constraints}, CAST(#{contextFiles} AS jsonb), CAST(#{dependsOn} AS jsonb), #{status}, #{depth}, CAST(#{spawnedFromTaskId} AS uuid), CAST(#{workerAgentId} AS uuid), #{resultSummary}, #{errorMessage}, CAST(#{metadata} AS jsonb), #{startedAt}, #{finishedAt})
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM t_orchestration_task WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)

SELECT
FROM t_orchestration_task WHERE parent_session_id = CAST(#{parentSessionId} AS uuid) ORDER BY created_at ASC

SELECT
FROM t_orchestration_task WHERE parent_session_id = CAST(#{parentSessionId} AS uuid) AND status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_orchestration_task WHERE parent_session_id = CAST(#{parentSessionId} AS uuid) AND status = 'RUNNING'
mapper.update: UPDATE t_orchestration_task SET status = #{status}, goal = #{goal}, constraints = #{constraints}, depends_on = CAST(#{dependsOn} AS jsonb), context_files = CAST(#{contextFiles} AS jsonb), result_summary = #{resultSummary}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, metadata = CAST(#{metadata} AS jsonb), started_at = #{startedAt}, finished_at = #{finishedAt} WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
